ASR Outdoor 21 Piece Deluxe Gold Panning Testing Kit with Crucible Vials Storage

The 21pc Complete Gold Prospecting Kit by ASR Outdoor includes everything you'll need to get started making your fortune in precious metals!

With the price of gold skyrocketing, now is the perfect time to get started prospecting! This 21pc set includes all of the basic essentials you'll need to prospect, as well as offering a variety of other applications.

Key Features

  • Gold Pan: Size: 10" Diameter | Depth: 2" | Material: High Impact Flexible Plastic | Riffled Traps to Collect Mineral Deposits
  • Tool Box: Dimensions: 11 x 5 x 4 | Small Top compartment for Smaller Items (Vials) | Keeps Prospecting Tools Handy & Organized
  • Microfiber Cleaning Cloth: Dimensions: 12 x 16 | Colors Ship At Random (Black, Charcoal or Red) | Absorbs 7x Weight in Liquid | Washable/Reusable | Works on Any Surface
  • Snifter Bottles: Volume: 10mL (10 cc) | Combined Size of Nozzle & Bottle 5 x 1 Diameter
  • Illuminated Tweezers: 4X Magnification | 1 Glass Lens

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRGK-21
  • UPC: 706569870091
  • Color: Green

Inside the durable tool box you'll find two plastic snifter bottles, which are perfect for extracting gold from your gold pan. Simple to use, just squeeze the bottle and use the suction to grab nuggets and release them into the glass vials that we've also included! There are 6 short vials and 6 tall vials, so you'll be able to organize and store your gold effectively.

In addition, you'll also find a trowel for digging and a testing stone to test the minerals you find. The microfiber cleaning cloth will assist during clean up, and will work on any surface without the use of chemicals! This cloth is non-abrasive and environmentally friendly as you'll be able to reuse it for years!

In order to inspect your gold and other precious gems/minerals, we've also thrown in the ASR Outdoor tweezers. The tweezers feature an optical quality glass lens with 4x magnification, so you'll be able to determine fine detail without distortion. Made of stainless steel, the blades have precision needle points ideal for manipulating tiny objects.

BONUS: This kit wouldn't be complete without a gold pan! As well as the gold prospecting kit, we've added in a bonus prospecting pan, ideal for testing deposits of heavy minerals like gold. It features riffled traps to catch your gold as lighter material flows out of the pan. A wide textured bottom efficiently separates remaining black sands, and the deep color of the pan will highlight even the finest of gold deposits.

This kit makes for a great gift for beginning and advanced gold prospectors alike!

Please note: colors and contents may vary from photo.
